name: Chicken Stew with Pepper and Pineapple
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast halves
8 ounces pineapple chunks in juice, drained/juice reserved
1 medium red bell pepper, cut into 1-inch (1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix chicken, carrots, broth, gingerroot, brown sugar, soy sauce, allspice, and red pepper sauce in a 3-4 quart Crock Pot.
2. Cover and cook on Low heat setting for 7-8 hours or until vegetables are tender and chicken is no longer pink in the center.
3. Mix cornstarch and reserved pineapple juice; gradually stir into chicken mixture. Stir in pineapple and bell pepper.
4. Cover and cook on High heat setting for about 15 minutes longer or until slightly thickened and bubbly.
1 teaspoon ground ginger may be substituted for fresh gingerroot.
Serves 4
Per serving: 232 calories, 35% fat, 4g fat, 60mg cholesterol, 750mg sodium, 25g carbohydrate, 27g protein
Diet Exchanges: 1 starch, 3.5 very lean meat, 0.5 fruit
Betty Crocker Casseroles and One-Dish Meals #142, p. 72
